*TERMINAL_trandcripz.txt
# [Docs](ttps://termux.dev/docs)
# [Donate](https://termux.dev/donate)
# [Community](https://termux.dev/community)

Working with packages:

 - Search:  pkg search <query>
 - Install: pkg install <package>
 - Upgrade: pkg upgrade

Subscribing to additional repositories:

 - Root:    pkg install root-repo
 - X11:     pkg install x11-repo

For fixing any repository issues,
try 'termux-change-repo' command.

Report issues at https://termux.dev/issues
~ $ apt update
Get:1 https://mirrors.hust.edu.cn/termux/apt/termux-main stable InRelease [14.0 kB]
Get:2 https://mirrors.hust.edu.cn/termux/apt/termux-x11 x11 InRelease [14.0 kB]
Get:3 https://mirrors.hust.edu.cn/termux/apt/termux-main stable/main aarch64 Packages [543 kB]
Get:4 https://mirrors.hust.edu.cn/termux/apt/termux-main stable/main aarch64 Contents (deb) [3020 kB]
Get:5 https://mirrors.hust.edu.cn/termux/apt/termux-x11 x11/main aarch64 Packages [194 kB]
Get:6 https://mirrors.hust.edu.cn/termux/apt/termux-x11 x11/main aarch64 Contents (deb) [3044 kB]
Fetched 6829 kB in 7s (957 kB/s)
Reading package lists... Done
Building dependency tree... Done
Reading state information... Done
3 packages can be upgraded. Run 'apt list --upgradable' to see them.
~ $ apt full-update
E: Invalid operation full-update
~ $ apt full-upgrade
Reading package lists... Done
Building dependency tree... Done
Reading state information... Done
Calculating upgrade... Done
The following package was automatically installed and is no longer required:
  binutils
Use 'apt autoremove' to remove it.

  gh harfbuzz libsqlite

1 not fully installed or removed.
Need to get 10.6 MB of archives.

Do you want to continue? [Y/n]
